ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the test campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the test campaign */,
  "engine_config" TEXT /* Engine configuration used during the test campaign */,
  "test_site" TEXT /* Test site or facility where the test campaign was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the engine */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the engine */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Class of the engine */,
  "thrust_class" TEXT /* Thrust class of the engine */,
  "operating_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended operating conditions for the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test campaign */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine model being tested */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the test session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the test session */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Test conditions (e.g., altitude, temperature) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the test session */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES test_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES engine_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude during the test */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during the test */,
  "ambient_pressure" REAL /* Ambient pressure during the test */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the test */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the test */,
  "atmospheric_conditions" TEXT /* Atmospheric conditions during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor reading being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of test equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_session_equipment" (
  "session_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-equipment link */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the session */,
  "equipment_role" TEXT /* Role of the equipment in the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_session_equipment_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_session_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES test_equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was recorded */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_anomalies_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id")
)
